export * from '../index'; import * as _operators from '../operators/index'; export const operators = _operators; import * as _testing from '../testing/index'; export const testing = _testing; import * as _ajax from '../ajax/index'; export const ajax = _ajax; import * as _webSocket from '../webSocket/index'; export const webSocket = _webSocket; import * as _fetch from '../fetch/index'; export const fetch = _fetch; //# sourceMappingURL=umd.js.map
